typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		project_id as string,
		ID as string,
		Code as string,
		Description as string,
		CreatedByID as string,
		CreatedDate as string,
		ModifiedByID as string,
		ModifiedDate as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/Phases/sitepro_phases.csv']) ~> sourcePhasesSiteproStage
sourcePhasesSiteproStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/Phases/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'phases_sitepro_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		project_id,
		ID,
		Code,
		Description,
		CreatedByID,
		CreatedDate,
		ModifiedByID,
		ModifiedDate,
		FileName
	)) ~> snkPHASESSiteproRaw
